page_content:
HESP722 Psychoacoustics (3 Credits) Auditory perception and auditory processing in normal and impaired hearing.

HESP724 Research Design (3 Credits) Evaluations of research designs, critique of published articles and student involvement in designing experiments on assigned topics. Prerequisite: Must have completed a course in basic statistics.

HESP734 Basic Hearing Measurement Laboratory (1 Credit) Supplemental lab experience that coincides with HESP606: Basic Hearing Measurement. Students will complete hands-on learning activities to reinforce theoretical concepts from the didactic learning in HESP606. The goal of this lab is to facilitate the transfer of learning from the classroom to clinical practicum. Prerequisite: HESP416. Corequisite: HESP606.

HESP728 Advanced Clinical Practice in Speech (1-8 Credits) Clinical internship in selected off-campus facilities. Prerequisite: HESP648. Restriction: Permission of instructor. Repeatable to: 8 credits.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY
